user_query: I would like to know the daily dividend data for the stock symbol AAPL from March 2, 2022, to March 3, 2022. Additionally, fetch the historical price data for this stock symbol and provide the stock profile data.

TaskList.description: Fetch the daily dividend data for the stock symbol AAPL from March 2, 2022, to March 3, 2022.
Fetch the historical price data for the stock symbol AAPL.
Fetch the stock profile data for the stock symbol AAPL.
